principles: Keep authored MDX content, TaxKit content contracts, reusable Fumadocs internals and app rendering in separate ownership layers.
Use Effect Schema as the canonical source for frontmatter, meta, navigation, loader and validation contracts.
Use Fumadocs for MDX validation and rendering instead of hand-written markdown rendering.
Keep browser/runtime imports behind explicit browser-safe and server-only package exports.
Run at least three documented improvement audit passes for each substantial task before parent acceptance.

requiredBeforeFinalPR: browser screenshot verification for docs home, one nested guide page, one code block page and one Mermaid or flowchart page when present at 1440x1000 and 390x844
audits: rg audit proving apps/docs browser modules do not import @taxkit/docs-content/server or generated .source/server files
rg audit proving packages/docs-content has no React route, layout or renderer ownership
rg audit proving packages/docs-fumadocs does not import @taxkit/docs-content or TaxKit content policy
rg audit for unsafe casts, local DTO mirrors, trivial wrappers, switch statements, Object.values and Object.entries in touched docs runtime code
globalVerification.changeset: Package-facing tasks must add or update a Changeset with bun run changeset. Docs-only architecture/spec updates may state an explicit no-changeset rationale.
globalVerification.browserEvidence: App-rendering tasks must start the docs app, capture screenshots at 1440x1000 and 390x844, save them under the active exec plan evidence directory, and link those screenshots in the handoff for parent review.

delegationPrompt:
You are implementing exactly one task from the TaxKit spec/task list.

Before editing:

- Read the target spec, this task object, relevant current files, and the relevant docs in `docs/architecture/*`.
- Read and thoroughly follow the documentation standards suite for docs-writing tasks: `docs/standards/documentation-style.md`, `docs/standards/documentation-writing.md`, `docs/standards/documentation-templates.md`, the relevant template file, `docs/standards/documentation-review.md`, `docs/standards/documentation-architecture.md`, `docs/standards/documentation-user-journeys.md`, and the relevant user journey file.
- Identify the owning package for every schema, type, ID, service, layer and tagged error you touch.
- Review the spec's call-graph diagrams before editing, and update/report them if implementation discovers a different final graph.

Implementation rules:

- MUST use Effect-native primitives when they fit: `Data`, `Schema`, `Array`, `Chunk`, `HashSet`, `HashMap`, `Match`, `Context`, `Layer`, `Config`, `Service`, `Record`, `Result`, `Exit`, `Bun`, `Platform`, `Command` and `ManagedRuntime`.
- Do not fall back to plain TypeScript control flow, nullable values, mutable records, mutable arrays, `switch`, `Object.values`, `Object.entries`, ad hoc `_tag` objects, unsafe casts, stringly branching, custom env parsing or hand-rolled runtime wrappers when an Effect/schema/platform primitive fits.
- Reuse canonical schema-derived types, branded IDs, tagged errors, service contracts and constructors from the owning package.
- Do not create mirrored DTOs, local duplicate types, local duplicate schemas or transport-only shape copies when an owning schema or API/SDK contract already exists.
- Keep one-off Effect error handling and transformations inline at the callsite. Do not extract tiny mapper/wrapper helpers for single-use `Effect.mapError`, `Effect.catchTag`, `Effect.catchAll` or `Effect.catchAllDefect`.
- Browser/runtime code must consume browser-safe API/SDK/docs exports instead of importing server-only internals.
- Package-facing changes MUST add or update a Changeset with `bun run changeset`, using a user-facing changelog summary. If the task is not package-facing, state that explicitly in the handoff.

Verification and handoff:

- Run this task's mandatory verification gates, including `bun run verification` unless the task explicitly documents a narrower gate.
- Run task-specific tests, smoke checks, browser checks or architecture audits required by the task's blast radius.
- For app-rendering tasks, start the docs app and capture reviewable screenshots at desktop and mobile widths. Save them under the active exec plan evidence directory and link them in the handoff.
- For substantial code, app, package-boundary or docs-runtime work, run and document at least three implementation improvement audit passes before handoff.
- Audit the diff for helper sprawl, canonical type/schema/id/error reuse, unsafe casts, local DTO mirrors, stringly branching and browser-safe imports where relevant.
- Report the Changeset path and release-train impact, or report why no Changeset was required.
- Report changed files, verification commands, outcomes and residual risks.
- Report whether the final implementation still matches the spec's call graph.
- Do not start or delegate another task. The parent agent must review, audit, verify and explicitly accept this task before the next task begins.

tasks.title: Create reusable docs Fumadocs package
scope: Create `packages/docs-fumadocs` with package name `@taxkit/docs-fumadocs`.
Port reusable ideas from `Projects/site/packages/posts/source.config.ts` and `Projects/mobius/packages/docs/core/src/fumadocs.ts` without copying app-specific or non-Effect patterns blindly.
Expose generic Effect Schema to Standard Schema bridge helpers, generic meta schema, shared MDX options, code block metadata transformer, Fumadocs source loader helpers and page tree helpers.
Add focused tests for schema bridging, page tree conversion and any source loader adapter contracts.
Add package README guidance for browser-safe and server-only exports.
mandatoryVerification: rg audit proving @taxkit/docs-fumadocs does not import @taxkit/docs-content
rg audit for unsafe casts, local DTO mirrors, switch statements, Object.values and Object.entries in packages/docs-fumadocs
qualityAudits: Pass 1: audit package exports and import graph for server/browser separation.
Pass 2: audit Effect-native control flow, schema-derived types and tagged errors.
Pass 3: audit helper sprawl and remove wrappers that do not own reusable behaviour.
tasks.changeset: Required because a new package-facing private workspace package is added.

tasks.title: Refactor docs content onto reusable Fumadocs internals
scope: Update `packages/docs-content/source.config.ts` to use `@taxkit/docs-fumadocs/config` helpers.
Keep TaxKit-specific frontmatter, navigation, page path and validation schemas in `@taxkit/docs-content`.
Refactor `DocsContentServiceLive` so page lookup and renderable page data come from the Fumadocs generated source through a reusable source adapter.
Keep raw file reads only for validation rules that need source text.
Update docs-content tests and README to describe the new boundary.
mandatoryVerification: rg audit proving packages/docs-content has no React route, layout or app renderer ownership
rg audit proving package code reuses canonical DocsPageFrontmatter, DocsNavigation and tagged docs errors
qualityAudits: Pass 1: audit current and target call graphs against actual imports.
Pass 2: audit frontmatter/meta/navigation decode paths for Effect Schema ownership.
Pass 3: audit validation policy for generic Fumadocs logic that should move to @taxkit/docs-fumadocs.

tasks.title: Render docs pages through Fumadocs compiled MDX
scope: Replace the app-local hand-written markdown renderer with compiled MDX rendering from Fumadocs generated source.
Create app-local route boundary schemas for docs loader success and failure data.
Compose reusable MDX primitives from `@taxkit/docs-fumadocs/render` with TaxKit-specific components in `apps/docs/src/lib`.
Use `Effect.Match` for loader result and closed rendering branches where appropriate.
Add browser smoke coverage for docs home, a nested page, a page with a code block and a Mermaid or flowchart page when present.
Capture reviewable screenshots for desktop and mobile widths and link them in the handoff.
mandatoryVerification: inspect browser console output and treat hydration errors, missing navigation, clipped text, overlapping UI, unstyled code blocks, broken links and unrendered MDX components as failures
save screenshots under the active exec plan evidence directory and link them in the handoff for parent review
browser screenshot verification for docs home, one nested guide page, one code block page and one Mermaid or flowchart page when present at 1440x1000 and 390x844
start the docs app with `bun run --filter=docs dev` or the repo-approved portless docs command
rg audit proving apps/docs browser modules do not import @taxkit/docs-content/server or generated .source/server files
qualityAudits: Pass 1: audit app route loader schemas and serialisation boundaries.
Pass 2: audit renderer component map for app-specific versus reusable ownership.
Pass 3: audit browser-safe imports and remove direct generated-source imports from browser modules.
Pass 4: audit desktop and mobile screenshots for layout, navigation, typography, code blocks and MDX component rendering.
tasks.changeset: Required if package exports are changed; otherwise document app-internal no-changeset rationale.

tasks.title: Strengthen MDX validation and component policy
scope: Add or refine validation that proves frontmatter, meta, navigation and MDX component usage match canonical schemas and the allowed component map.
Keep examples and OpenAPI reference smoke checks in `@taxkit/docs-content`.
Ensure validation can be run independently of the docs app route renderer.
Document the validation policy in package README or architecture docs.
mandatoryVerification: manual audit that validation uses Effect Schema and does not mirror public SDK/API DTOs
qualityAudits: Pass 1: audit validation failures for clear developer-facing messages.
Pass 2: audit canonical schema/type/id reuse and remove duplicate DTO shapes.
Pass 3: audit validation helpers for one-off wrappers that should stay inline.
tasks.changeset: Required if package validation behaviour changes.

tasks.title: Update architecture docs and final call graph
scope: Update architecture docs, package README files and product specs so they describe the implemented package split.
Resolve the nested `packages/docs/fumadocs` versus flat `packages/docs-fumadocs` path discrepancy.
Update final call graphs if implementation discovers a better graph.
Run documentation review passes for reader fit, sentence-case headings, Australian spelling, banned language, links and source-of-truth accuracy.
mandatoryVerification: documentation standards audit against docs/standards/documentation-style.md and docs/standards/documentation-review.md
link audit for all changed local documentation links
call-graph audit against implemented imports and package exports
qualityAudits: Pass 1: audit docs for correct reader, purpose and source-of-truth links.
Pass 2: audit docs for sentence-case headings, Australian spelling and no banned marketing language.
Pass 3: audit architecture and package names against actual workspace paths and exports.
tasks.changeset: No changeset required for docs-only architecture updates unless package-facing README behaviour changes.

completionCriteria: The final implementation matches the target call graph or the spec is updated with the actual graph.
`@taxkit/docs-fumadocs` owns reusable Fumadocs internals and does not import TaxKit content policy.
`@taxkit/docs-content` owns TaxKit content schemas, service and validation only.
`apps/docs` renders compiled Fumadocs MDX modules through an app-local component map.
All mandatory verification and import graph audits pass.
Browser screenshots for the final docs app routes are linked in the implementation handoff and reviewed by the parent before acceptance.
Every substantial task has three documented improvement audit passes and parent acceptance.
